text.heading: XXX UNIVERSITY. THE POSTGRADUATE COLLEGE
APPLICATION FOR CHANGE OF EXAMINERS
text.p: SECTION A (To be completed by the student)
1. Name of Candidate:
(Surname in Capitals) (First) (Other Names)
2. Candidate's Registration No.:
3. (i) Degree to Which Candidate was Admitted
(ii) Semester and Session of First Registration:
4. Number of Semesters already Spent:
5. Department and Faculty: Department of English. Faculty of Arts.
6. Approved Thesis Title: Collocational Errors in the Written English of Senior Secondary School Pupils in Six Yoruba-speaking States in Nigeria.
7. Approved Examiners and Date of Approval:
Chief Examiner: Dr (Senior Lecturer) Department of English.
Supervisor: Dr (Reader) Department of English
Examiners: (i) Dr (Senior Lecturer) Department of English.
(ii) Dr (Senior Lecturer) Department of English. External Examiner: Prof Department of Linguistics. University of
Date of Approval: 22nd May, 2002
8. Proposed Examiners:
Chief Examiner: Dr (Reader) Department of English.
Supervisor: Dr (Reader) Department of English
Examiners: (i) Dr (Senior Lecturer) Department of English
(ii) Dr (Senior Lecturer) Department of Foreign
Languages
9. Reason(s) for Change (i) The approved Chief Examiner (Dr. has been has been replaced by
(ii) The second approved examiner (Dr ) passed away last year (2002}
10. Chief Examiner's Name. Signature and Date
Name Signature Date Faculty Postgraduate Committee's Comments
Name and Signature Date
Chairman. Faculty Postgraduate Committee
